_comment: PAW Group Security Configuration — TM1 Governance Suite
_instructions: Add groups here to enable role-based filtering in the Workbook Tree. folder_permissions keys must match PAW content paths exactly.

groups.name: Admin
groups.description: Full administrative access — all folders, all books, TM1 server admin.

groups.name: CST
groups.description: Costing team — access to Costing Allocation folder. Read access to shared root. No access to Admin folder.
